mapper.select: SELECT id, work_order_id, step_no, step_name, status, completed_time, duration, remark, create_time FROM work_order_step WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY step_no ASC

SELECT id, work_order_id, step_no, step_name, status, completed_time, duration, remark, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM work_order_step WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY step_no ASC
